testcase.name: testRustFSCreateBucketAndUpload
testcase.system-out:
Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 22:57:31.709 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.neighborhood.app.RustFSConnectionTest]: RustFSConnectionTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:57:31.791 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.neighborhood.app.Application for test class com.neighborhood.app.RustFSConnectionTest
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/ :: Spring Boot :: (v3.2.0)
2026-05-24T22:57:32.152+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] c.neighborhood.app.RustFSConnectionTest : Starting RustFSConnectionTest using Java 17.0.12 with PID 29648 (started by 16688 in D:\下载文件\同城生活\backend-java-reference) 2026-05-24T22:57:32.154+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] c.neighborhood.app.RustFSConnectionTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-05-24T22:57:32.843+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Multiple Spring Data modules found, entering strict repository configuration mode 2026-05-24T22:57:32.845+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data Redis repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-05-24T22:57:32.880+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 21 ms. Found 0 Redis repository interfaces. Logging initialized using 'class org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl' adapter. Use localhost address Get yuan/10.30.149.80 network interface Get network interface info: name:eth7 (Realtek PCIe GbE Family Controller) Initialization Sequence datacenterId:11 workerId:19 _ _ |_ _ _|_. ___ _ | _ | | |\/|_)(_| | |_\ |_)||_|_\ / | 3.5.6 2026-05-24T22:57:35.621+08:00 INFO 29648 --- [neighborhood-app] [ main] c.neighborhood.app.RustFSConnectionTest : Started RustFSConnectionTest in 3.697 seconds (process running for 4.503) === RustFS 创建Bucket并上传测试 ===
1. 创建Bucket: neighborhood Bucket已属于你，跳过创建
2. 上传测试文件... 上传成功: test/1779634656504.txt
3. 下载验证... 下载内容: Hello from RustFS! 1779634656503
✅ 全部测试通过!
